paragraphs.text: 一闪一闪亮晶晶，满天都是小星星。挂在天上放光明，好像许多小眼睛。
paragraphs.translation: Twinkle twinkle little star, how I wonder what you are. Up above the world so high, like a diamond in the sky.

paragraphs.text: 小星星真美丽。我要摘一颗送给你。
paragraphs.translation: Little stars are so beautiful. I want to pick one and give it to you.
